title: Chairperson, Committee for SC/ST
summary: In compliance with the Scheduled Castes and the Scheduled Tribe (Prevention of Atrocities) Act 1989, No 33 of 1989

title: Chairperson, Library Committee
summary: To look after recommendations for purchase of various databases, journals and books in IIFT Kakinada Campus.

title: Coordinator, Institutions Innovation Council (IIC)
summary: To look after IIC's Internship activities and IPR activities

title: Faculty In-Charge, International Collaboration & Capacity Development Division (ICCD)

title: Chairperson, Anti-Ragging Squad
summary:
The squad will initially investigate all student's complaints regarding ragging.

This Anti-Ragging Squad will be valid for the period of Two Academic Years.

title: Website launched on GitHub Pages
summary: The academic profile website of Dr. Jitendra Kumar Verma has been prepared with sections covering qualifications, interests, teaching, research, work experience, and contact details.
